subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Ḥasan! The Light calleth aloud and proclaimeth: O dwellers in the graves! By God, He Who conversed with the Mount hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسن ان النور ینادی و یقول یا اصحاب القبور تالله قد ظهر مکلم الطور
subcodes.subjects: @return of the Manifestations of God, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
